title: Tree-Based Models Path
description: Build fluency in Tree-Based Models inside Ensemble Methods by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Boosting Ensemble
steps.summary: Boosting Ensemble belongs to the Ensemble Methods area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Ensemble Methods / Tree-Based Models. Start after Boosting and Ensemble Model. It opens into Dynamic Ensemble Boosting and Ensemble Gradient Boosting.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Ensemble Selection
steps.summary: Ensemble Selection belongs to the Ensemble Methods area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Ensemble Methods / Tree-Based Models. Start after Ensemble Model and Selection. It opens into Greedy Ensemble Selection and Caruana Ensemble Selection.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Ensemble Kalman Filter
steps.summary: Ensemble Kalman Filter belongs to the Ensemble Methods area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Ensemble Methods / Tree-Based Models. Start after Ensemble Model and kalman filter. It opens into Ensemble Kalman Filter Extensions and Ensemble Kalman Filter Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.
